nonEmptyString.description: Reusable helper: a string with at least one character.

nullableString.description: Reusable helper: a string or null.

stringArray.description: Reusable helper: an array of strings.

workItemRelations.description: Typed work-item relations between backlog items.

depends_on.description: Hard prerequisite work-item ids that must advance or land before this item.

enables.description: Work-item ids this item intentionally makes possible or materially easier.

related_to.description: Non-gating semantic or strategic links; never use as a hidden dependency list.

supersedes.description: Work-item ids intentionally replaced by this item.

wsjf.description: Weighted Shortest Job First scoring block used to rank the backlog.

user_business_value.description: Relative user/business value of the work item.

time_criticality.description: How time-sensitive the value is (it decays if delayed).

job_size.description: Relative size/effort of the job (the WSJF denominator).

score.description: Computed WSJF score = (user_business_value + time_criticality + risk_reduction) / job_size.

cost.description: Token-cost accounting block (see the cost-snapshot invariant instructions).

tokens_in.description: NET-NEW prompt tokens = sum(inputTokens − cachedTokens) of this item's dispatches.

tokens_out.description: Sum of outputTokens of those dispatches.

tokens_cached.description: Sum of cachedTokens (re-sent context); excluded from tokens_self, kept for billed-cost reconstruction.

tokens_self.description: tokens_in + tokens_out — the item's own net cost.

tokens_rolled.description: tokens_self plus the rolled cost of child items — the item's end-to-end cost.

dispatches.description: Number of subagent dispatches counted into tokens_self (not llm_request turns).

source.description: Provenance of the cost figures: measured, estimated, or mixed.

committed.description: YYYY-MM-DD the one-time cost snapshot was written; immutable after (null until committed).

githubSync.description: GitHub Projects sync envelope; filled by portfolio/_sync, null when authoring.

issue_number.description: GitHub issue number; filled by portfolio/_sync, null when authoring.

issue_node_id.description: GitHub issue node id; filled by portfolio/_sync, null when authoring.

project_item_id.description: GitHub Projects item id; filled by portfolio/_sync, null when authoring.

openItems.description: Clarification + challenge ledger entries (each an object: id, kind, raised_by, owner, blocking, status, ...).

__path.description: Workspace-relative path of the artifact file, injected by the orchestration harness (not authored in frontmatter).

__kind.description: Artifact-kind discriminator injected by the harness; must equal x-artifact.kind.

__artifact_id.description: Stable artifact id injected by the harness, derived from the file and frontmatter.

__frontmatter_present.description: Harness assertion that YAML frontmatter was found and parsed; always true for a valid artifact.

__sections.description: Artifact body sections keyed by their `## ` heading — one property per template section; the value is the raw Markdown under that heading. Authored artifacts may add or omit sections, so this is advisory (additionalProperties is permitted) and no section is individually required.

Gate notes.description: Open questions for the next architecture pass or for the ★ Architecture Gate.

__body.description: Raw Markdown body of the artifact (everything after the frontmatter), injected by the harness.

id.description: Stable artifact identifier (matches the filename stem).

work_item_relations.description: Typed work-item relations (depends_on / enables / related_to / supersedes).

wsjf.description: Weighted Shortest Job First scoring block.

risk.description: Risk level — the consequence of being wrong: low | medium | critical.

complexity.description: Complexity — cognitive/structural difficulty: simple | involved | complex.

open_items.description: Clarification + challenge ledger (a blocking open entry halts the relevant gate).

cost.description: Token-cost accounting block (see the cost definition).

github.description: GitHub Projects sync envelope, filled by portfolio/_sync (null when authoring).

attestations.description: Agent-attested judgment booleans (rung-3 pre/post), keyed by condition id.
